text:
Created attachment 162102
Change in en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing/article.xml

Hello, I found these while translating the article:

----
In 3.2.2.2. Ensure your ports continue to build correctly,

When their ports tree amd INDEX was last updated
-> When their ports tree *and* INDEX was last updated

In 3.5. Resources for ports maintainers and contributors

documentation is located at the poudriere home page
-> *D*ocumentation is located at the poudriere home page
----

I'm not sure whether these are correct or not, since I'm not a native English speaker.  Please check the attached diff file, also.

Thank you :)
